# Markdown Only Discipline

## Rule

Everything durable is Markdown.

## Allowed

```text
.md files
Markdown tables
fenced pseudocode
fenced API examples
relative Markdown links
```

## Not allowed as files

```text
.csv
.json
.yaml
.yml
.sql
.py
.html
.txt
```

If structured data is needed, place it inside Markdown.
